Compliance and sustainability personnel are best understood as workflow integrators, not mere record archivists.

where noncompliance appears, certification is withheld until corrective actions are completed.

Use DEC-091 and DEC-092 authority to move from evidence_collecting to gap_identified; do not overwrite predecessor evidence.
Notify only the roles and downstream records affected by the decision.
closure_evidence: attributed EXC-060 observation and affected scope
evidence_collecting to gap_identified transition with decision authority
preserved predecessor record and successor or disposition link
downstream reconciliation and acknowledgement where applicable

Compliance and sustainability personnel are best understood as workflow integrators, not mere record archivists.
SWNZ requires annual questionnaires, site management plans, full spray diaries, a biosecurity register, and periodic audits
where noncompliance appears, certification is withheld until corrective actions are completed.
inputs: current state, restriction, deadline, and source version

Notify only the roles and downstream records affected by the decision.

under_review to noncompliant transition with decision authority
preserved predecessor record and successor or disposition link
